theme: Self-contained demo stacks — give stack-demo its OWN platform clone set so a box with only stack-demo/ (no stack-dev/) can run a demo end-to-end. Re-implements the orphaned m26/self-contained-demo branch (@25ab855, tag prop-room-m26 — predates v1.6/v1.7, unmergeable) onto current main: a NEW demo-stack/ensure-clones.sh bootstraps stack-demo's peer clones (clone platform over SSH + make init the repos.yml repos + seed the shared .env copy-if-present + provenance lockfile); up-injected.sh adds a DEMO=$DEMO_WS build-source alias [D2] + moves PLAT to stack-demo/platform [D-MAIN] so ALL services (incl. the non-Clerk compose-built ones) build from stack-demo, repoints the frontend/Go-service build SOURCE reads to $DEMO, and gates dev-image reuse behind a new --reuse-dev-images flag (OFF by default [D5]); gen_injected_override.py gains the reuse_dev_images=False gate; migrate-demo.sh/ant-academy.sh/rosetta-demo repoint to stack-demo [D3]. Preserves the v1.6 stack-secrets module + M30 BASE_ENV provision (paths repointed to stack-demo, behavior preserved), M31 mkcert FAPI branch, M32 studio-desk single-port fix. Tooling + docs only — zero platform-repo edits (stack-demo/platform is a build CONTEXT only).

The +28 in demo-stack = build-time new tests (TestEnsureClones, TestSelfContainedSource, TestRenameDrift retargets, TestShellcheck +1) + the 2 harden passes (TestEnsureClonesFunctional +12, TestReuseFlagArrayExpansion +3). The +2 in stack-injection = the reuse_dev_images opt-in tests [D5]. The GUIDE.md curated count (the TestGuideDocTruth-formula subset, advertised 41 per D6) reconciles dynamically — green. flake_gate: PASS — demo-stack 5/5 + stack-injection 5/5 randomized sequential (10 total runs, 0 fail). demo-stack 138/138 + stack-injection 113/113 each run. shellcheck clean on all 5 touched shell scripts (ensure-clones.sh, up-injected.sh, migrate-demo.sh, ant-academy.sh, rosetta-demo). No CI wired (local fallback — same carry-forward as v1.5/v1.6/v1.7).
coverage_snapshot: gen_injected_override.py at 99% (1 miss = the unreachable `if __name__` guard; main() IS covered; the reuse_dev_images gate fully tested). Shell scripts can't be coverage.py-instrumented -> 'coverage' = functional extract-and-run harnesses + mutation evidence. ensure-clones.sh (the NEW unit): TestEnsureClonesFunctional (+12) is a sandboxed harness stubbing git/make on a constrained PATH (no live network) + the REAL python3 heredoc, covering broken-partial-clone exit-1, the D4 .env seed (copy-if-present + non-fatal-skip-if-absent + never-clobber), make init-studio non-fatal, the provenance lockfile (valid sorted JSON), and full re-run idempotency — mutation-verified (re-introducing the orphan's fail-loud .env / defeating never-clobber / deleting the broken-partial abort each fail). The --reuse-dev-images SHELL seam: TestReuseFlagArrayExpansion (+3) runs the real flag-assembly+call block under set -euo pipefail on bash 3.2 across all 8 (ui,lc,reuse) combinations, mutation-verified against the bare-empty-array set -u crash (the M28 empty-array class). No >2pp drop on any measured surface.
field_bake: Section gate satisfied BY COMPOSITION at close (the accepted M31-D7 / M32-D5 pattern), NOT by a live bring-up: (1) static self-containment assertions (TestSelfContainedSource: frontend ctx + Go src resolve to stack-demo; injection targets only the per-demo COPY; no silent stack-dev SOURCE fallback); (2) the functional ensure-clones harness (TestEnsureClonesFunctional: broken-partial guard, D4 non-fatal .env seed, idempotency, provenance lockfile, all stubbed git/make); (3) full unit suites green (138 + 113) + the flake gate (5/5 each). The FULL LIVE field-bake on a freshly-emptied stack-demo/ (the on-disk one is already populated from the orphan run + would mask a from-scratch failure) is a USER-AUTHORIZED follow-up — the orchestrator offers it after close (consistent with the M25 / M30 live field-bakes run only on explicit go-ahead).
supply_chain: GREEN — UNCHANGED from v1.7. M26 adds zero dependencies: ensure-clones.sh is pure shell + a python-stdlib (json/os/sys) provenance heredoc; up-injected.sh / the 4 repointed scripts are shell; gen_injected_override.py is stdlib; the tests are python-stdlib + pytest (already in the toolchain); the rosetta side is docs only. No go.mod/go.sum change (no Go touched), no new third-party Python package, no manifest change of any kind.
alignment_gates: 100%/100% on all 4 Clerkenstein surfaces (untouched by M26 — the milestone changes the demo build SOURCE / bring-up, no mirror-engine change).

Deferral re-audit GREEN (0 deferrals — M26 is the only milestone of v1.8, nothing inherited).
